eslintConfigPath.description: Explicit path to the flat ESLint config file to patch. When omitted, Nx Governance autodetects eslint.config.mjs, eslint.config.cjs, then eslint.config.js.

governanceHelperPath.description: Path where the generated governance depConstraints helper module should be written. The helper syncs allowedDomainDependencies for ESLint; explicit allowedLayerDependencies remain runtime-governance policy.

profile.description: Governance profile name resolved under tools/governance/profiles/ when migrating inline ESLint depConstraints. When omitted, Nx Governance falls back to the default runtime profile name.

profilePath.description: Governance profile path to seed or migrate when extracting inline ESLint depConstraints.
